calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Dec-27-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a minor.Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Vantree CSR: L. Gillian #12355.
Petitioner HUIMIN CAI, mother was present in pro per as Guardian ad Litem for the minor WENHUI LI.

Cantonese Interpreter: Jenny Yau present on behalf of thr petitioner. Petitioner and Interpreter was placed under oath and examined.

Minor's father HONGCAO LI was not present, per the mother of minor child HUIMIN CAI, the father is at home today. The Court accepts this and proceeds with the hearing.

Proof of Publication is in the file.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minor to ALLEN WENHUI LI.
Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
